title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: HEALTH SHARE OF OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health Share of Oregon is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Health Share of Oregon; members are able to choose medical care through CareOregon, Kaiser Permanente, Legacy Health, OHSU, or Providence. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm Email (503) 416-8090 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 416-8090 Main phone (888) 519-3845 Toll-free Main phone (503) 416-8090 Toll-free (888) 519-3845 Ride to Care (503) 416-3955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - CAREOREGON HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - KAISER PERMANENTE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - LEGACY HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - OHSU HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - PROVIDENCE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
